cells.english: In the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
cells.coptic: Ϧⲉⲛ ⲫ̀ⲣⲁⲛ ⲙ̀Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ ⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ: ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ.
cells.arabic: باسمِ الآبِ والابنِ والرّوحِ القُدُسِ الإلهِ الواحدِ. آمين.

cells.english: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. Lord bless us. Amen.
cells.arabic: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ. ياربُّ ارحَمْ. ياربُّ ارحَمْ. ياربُّ بارِكْ. آمين.

cells.english: Glory to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit. Now and ever and unto the ages of the ages. Amen.
cells.arabic: المجدُ للآبِ والابنِ والرّوحِ القُدُسِ الآنَ وكلَّ أوانٍ وإلى دهرِ الدهورِ. آمين.

repeated_prayer_title: The Lord's Prayer
The Prayer of Thanksgiving
Psalm 50

cells.english: The prayer of the ninth hour of this blessed day, we offer to Christ our King and our God, beseeching Him to forgive us our sins.
cells.arabic: تسبِحةُ الساعةِ التاسِعةِ مِنَ النهارِ المُبارَكِ أقدِّمُها للمسيحِ ملكي وإلهي، وأرجوهُ أن يغفِرَ لي خطايايَ.

cells.english: From the Psalms of our teacher David the prophet. May his blessings be upon us all. Amen.
cells.arabic: مِنْ مزاميرِ مُعلِّمِنا داودَ النبي بركاتِهِ علينا. آمين.

repeated_prayer_title: Psalm 95 - Sing to the Lord a new song; sing to the Lord...
Psalm 96 - The Lord reigned, let the earth exult...
Psalm 97 - Sing to the Lord a new song, for the Lord...
Psalm 98 - The Lord reigned; let the people rage...
Psalm 99 - Shout joyfully to the Lord...
Psalm 100 - I will sing of mercy...
Psalm 109 - The Lord said to my Lord...
Psalm 110 - I will give thanks to You...
Psalm 111 - Blessed is the man...
Psalm 112 - Praise the Lord, O the servants...
Psalm 114 - I loved, because the Lord...
Psalm 115 - I believed, therefore, I have spoken...
Gospel (Luke 9:10-17)
We worship You, O Christ
Litanies of the 9th Hour

cells.english: O Lord hear us and have mercy on us and forgive us our sins. Amen.
cells.arabic: ياربُّ اسمَعْنا وارحَمْنا واغفِرْ لنا خطايانا. آمين.

repeated_prayer_title: Holy, Holy, Holy
The Lord's Prayer
Absolution of the 9th Hour
Conclusion of Every Hour
